jobs.title: Manager 2, Federal Support Engineering (Denver)
jobs.description: <p>We are Datadog's in-house product experts. The Datadog Federal Support Engineering team is dedicated to serving as highly trusted technical advisors for our Public Sector customers, who operate within some of the most highly regulated and security-constrained environments. As a Manager 2, you will be coaching and mentoring support engineers and collaborating across teams to achieve excellent customer and organizational results.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><em>At Datadog, we place value in our office culture - the relationships and collaboration it builds and the creativity it brings to the table. We operate as a hybrid workplace to ensure our Datadogs can create a work-life harmony that best fits them.</em></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>What You’ll Do:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Manage, develop, coach and mentor Federal Support Engineers and/or people managers and their teams who respond to client requests, reproduce and troubleshoot issues, and dive into Datadog’s 1000+ integrations</li> <li>Act as the owner for your team’s accountability and performance - managing performance reviews, performance plans, and any employee relations issues for your direct reports</li> <li>Partner with Support team senior leadership to oversee team projects and initiatives to improve productivity, process or procedure</li> <li>Partner with Engineering, Product Managers, AE’s, and CSM’s teams to oversee the GovCloud Feature requests and Product quality.</li> </ul> <ul> <li>Work with Federal Support Director on hiring, onboarding, successful training, and retaining top talent</li> <li>Guide the team through technical-training, certificates, additional learning, and development needs&nbsp;</li> </ul> <ul> <li>Drive projects or initiatives to improve team productivity, process, or procedure</li> </ul> <ul> <li>Collaborate with internal teams and customers on high-priority escalations and act as a resource to resolve escalations from team members as necessary</li> </ul> <p><strong>Who You Are:</strong></p> <ul> <li>3+ years of Management Experience in Technical Support, Solutions Engineering, or a related technical customer-facing function</li> <li>Passionate about people management and mentorship with previous experience leading a team, including managing other managers</li> <li>Self-motivated, detail-attentive, and have a desire for continuous learning&nbsp;</li> <li>A critical thinker who defaults to a client-centric approach and uses data to make informed decisions</li> <li>A tinkerer with some programming experience and a basic knowledge of Linux</li> </ul> <ul> <li>Able to handle a rotating pager/oncall schedule for incidents and business critical issues</li> </ul> <ul> <li>Active contribution to open-source projects (code, bug reports, etc.) and the Engineering Community (Meetups, etc.)</li> <li>Able to work onsite in an office location at least 3 days a week</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><em>Datadog values people from all walks of life. We understand not everyone will meet all the above qualifications on day one. That's okay. If you’re passionate about technology and want to grow your skills, we encourage you to apply.</em></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Benefits and Growth:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Best-in-breed onboarding</li> <li>Generous global benefits</li> <li>Intra-departmental mentor and buddy program for in-house networking</li> <li>New hire stock equity (RSUs) and employee stock purchase plan (ESPP)</li> <li>Continuous professional development, product training, and career pathing</li> <li>An inclusive company culture, able to join our Community Guilds and Inclusion Talks</li> </ul> <p><br><em>Benefits and Growth listed above may vary based on the country of your employment and the nature of your employment with Datadog.</em></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><em>To conform to U.S. export control regulations, candidates should be eligible for any required authorizations from the U.S. Government.</em></p> <p style="color: white;">#LI-Hybrid</p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p>Datadog offers a competitive salary and equity package, and may include variable compensation. Actual compensation is based on factors such as the candidate's skills, qualifications, and experience. In addition, Datadog offers a wide range of best in class, comprehensive and inclusive employee benefits for this role including healthcare, dental, parental planning, and mental health benefits, a 401(k) plan and match, paid time off, fitness reimbursements, and a discounted employee stock purchase plan.</p></div><div class="title">The reasonably estimated yearly salary for this role at Datadog is:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$128,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$171,000 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><hr> <p><strong>About Datadog:&nbsp;</strong></p> <p>Datadog (NASDAQ: DDOG) is a global SaaS business, delivering a rare combination of growth and profitability. We are on a mission to break down silos and solve complexity in the cloud age by enabling digital transformation, cloud migration, and infrastructure monitoring of our customers’ entire technology stacks. Built by engineers, for engineers, Datadog is used by organizations of all sizes across a wide range of industries. Together, we champion professional development, diversity of thought, innovation, and work excellence to empower continuous growth. Join the pack and become part of a collaborative, pragmatic, and thoughtful people-first community where we solve tough problems, take smart risks, and celebrate one another. Learn more about #DatadogLife on <a href="https://www.instagram.com/datadoghq/?hl=en" target="_blank">Instagram</a>, <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/datadog" target="_blank">LinkedIn,</a> and <a href="https://learn.datadoghq.com/" target="_blank">Datadog Learning Center. </a></p> <hr> <p data-renderer-start-pos="215"><strong data-renderer-mark="true">Equal Opportunity at Datadog:</strong></p> <p>Datadog is proud to offer <a href="https://www.eeoc.gov/sites/default/files/2023-06/22-088_EEOC_KnowYourRights6.12ScreenRdr.pdf" target="_blank">equal employment opportunity</a> to everyone regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity, veteran status, and other characteristics protected by law. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. Here are our <a href="https://www.datadoghq.com/legal/candidate-legal-notices/" target="_blank">Candidate Legal Notices</a> for your reference.&nbsp;</p> <p>Datadog endeavors to make our Careers Page accessible to all users. If you would like to contact us regarding the accessibility of our website or need assistance completing the application process, please complete <a href="https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeoJeduEZ2NdZF_65uZmWUrCM-zee7yADXX1s6Xr9zAGq8iKA/viewform" target="_blank">this form</a>. This form is for accommodation requests only and cannot be used to inquire about the status of applications.&nbsp;</p> <p data-renderer-start-pos="662"><strong data-renderer-mark="true">Privacy and AI Guidelines:</strong></p> <p data-renderer-start-pos="662">Any information you submit to Datadog as part of your application will be processed in accordance with Datadog’s&nbsp;<a class="c-link" href="https://www.datadoghq.com/legal/applicant-candidate-privacy/" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="https://www.datadoghq.com/legal/applicant-candidate-privacy/" data-sk="tooltip_parent">Applicant and Candidate Privacy Notice</a>. For information on our AI policy, please visit <a href="https://www.datadoghq.com/legal/interviewing-at-datadog-ai-guidelines/" target="_blank">Interviewing at Datadog AI Guidelines</a>.</p></div>

jobs.title: Engineering Manager, Toronto
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><h2>Join us in building the future of finance.</h2> <p>Our mission is to democratize finance for all. <a href="https://www.cerulli.com/press-releases/cerulli-anticipates-124-trillion-in-wealth-will-transfer-through-2048" target="_blank">An estimated $124 trillion of assets</a> will be inherited by younger generations in the next two decades. The largest transfer of wealth in human history. If you’re ready to be at the epicenter of this historic cultural and financial shift, keep reading.</p></div><h2><strong>About the team + role </strong></h2> <p>As an Engineering Manager, you’ll lead this dynamic team and work with product, data, and other engineering teams to drive innovation in Robinhood's Products. You’ll be responsible for crafting the team’s strategy, delivering impactful projects, and scaling the platform to meet the needs of our growing global user base.</p> <p>This role requires a strong technical background, a keen product sense, and a collaborative approach. If you're passionate about building the future of Robinhood and crafting seamless experiences for millions of users, we'd love to hear from you!</p> <p>The role is located in Toronto, Ontario, Canada, which will align with our in-office working environment. Please connect with your recruiter for more information regarding our in-office philosophy and expectations.</p> <h2><strong>What you’ll do</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Lead and empower your team: Provide technical and strategic leadership, mentoring engineers, and nurturing a culture of collaboration and innovation.</li> <li>Drive product excellence: Work closely with product managers, designers, and other teams to define and implement a roadmap for seamless payment experiences.</li> <li>Develop new features: Build and optimize payment solutions for global markets, ensuring they are intuitive and reliable.</li> <li>Scale for growth: Improve the platform to support international expansions, multi-account management, and new business features.</li> <li>Promote standard methodologies in engineering: Ensure high-quality code, scalability, and security in all deliverables.</li> </ul> <h2><strong>What you bring </strong></h2> <ul> <li><strong>Technical expertise</strong>: You have experience in backend development, (e.g., Python, Golang), and a deep understanding of building platforms.</li> <li>Strong product sense: You understand user needs and can translate business goals into elegant technical solutions.</li> <li>Leadership experience: Proven ability to lead engineering teams, drive complex projects, and deliver impactful results in a fast-paced environment.</li> <li>Collaborative approach: You excel in working with diverse teams and can influence collaborators across fields.</li> <li>Global perspective: Experience in building solutions for international users is a strong plus.</li> </ul> <p>At Robinhood, we believe in the power of in-person work to accelerate progress, spark innovation, and strengthen community. Our office experience is intentional, energizing, and designed to fully support high-performing teams.</p> <h2><strong>What we offer</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Challenging, high-impact work to grow your career</li> <li>Performance driven compensation with multipliers for outsized impact, bonus programs, equity ownership, and 401(k) matching</li> <li>Best in class benefits to fuel your work, including 100% paid health insurance for employees with 90% coverage for dependents</li> <li>Lifestyle wallet - a highly flexible benefits spending account for wellness, learning, and more</li> <li>Employer-paid life &amp; disability insurance, fertility benefits, and mental health benefits</li> <li>Time off to recharge including company holidays, paid time off, sick time, parental leave, and more!</li> <li>Exceptional office experience with catered meals, events, and comfortable workspaces.</li> </ul> <p>Our team is committed to providing an inclusive and welcoming interview experience for all candidates. If you require a specific accommodation during the application or interview process due to a physical or mental condition, please complete this<a href="https://robinhood.hracuity.net/webform/index/752875e4-42ba-4dff-9951-fd51e315997e"> Applicant Accommodation Form</a> to notify our team. The form should only be completed if you need a specific accommodation.</p> <p><strong>AI Usage Disclosure:</strong> Robinhood uses artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of our recruiting process. These tools enhance the efficiency and consistency of our hiring process; however, all hiring decisions are made by our hiring teams.</p> <p><strong>Vacancy Notice: </strong>This job posting represents an existing vacancy that we are actively seeking to fill.</p> <div id="te-floating-button-container"></div><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><strong>In addition to the base pay range listed below, this role is also eligible for bonus opportunities + equity + benefits.</strong></p> <p>Base pay for the successful applicant will depend on a variety of job-related factors, which may include education, training, experience, location, business needs, or market demands. The expected base pay range for this role is based on the location where the work will be performed.</p> <p><span style="text-decoration: underline;">Base Pay Range:</span></p></div><div class="title">Toronto, ON</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$200,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$235,000 CAD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p>Click <a href="https://careers.robinhood.com/benefits" target="_blank">here</a> to learn more about our Total Rewards, which vary by region and entity.</p> <p>If our mission energizes you and you’re ready to build the future of finance, we look forward to seeing your application.</p> <p>Robinhood provides equal opportunity for all applicants, offers reasonable accommodations upon request, and complies with applicable equal employment and privacy laws. Inclusion is built into how we hire and work—welcoming different backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences so everyone can do their best. Please review the&nbsp;<a href="https://careers.robinhood.com/applicantprivacypolicy" target="_blank">Privacy Policy</a> for your country of application.</p></div>

jobs.title: Product Manager, GTM Systems
jobs.description: <h2>Role Description</h2> <p><span class=" author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qotvoz70zz67zqvloxwcxz77zz76zbrz90zdz77zeycz82zz65zz73zq6z86z0z77z9">GTM TechOps owns the systems, data, and automation that power the full customer lifecycle, from first touch through renewal and expansion. This role sits within that ecosystem, with a focus on enabling our customer-facing GTM teams through AI-powered tools and workflows.</span></p> <p><span class=" author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qotvoz70zz67zqvloxwcxz77zz76zbrz90zdz77zeycz82zz65zz73zq6z86z0z77z9">As a </span><span class="thread-905954080788923177208615 author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qotvoz70zz67zqvloxwcxz77zz76zbrz90zdz77zeycz82zz65zz73zq6z86z0z77z9">Product Manager, GTM Systems</span><span class=" author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qotvoz70zz67zqvloxwcxz77zz76zbrz90zdz77zeycz82zz65zz73zq6z86z0z77z9">, you will define and drive how AI is applied across our</span><span class="thread-394128069114452585944662 author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qotvoz70zz67zqvloxwcxz77zz76zbrz90zdz77zeycz82zz65zz73zq6z86z0z77z9"> GTM systems</span><span class=" author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qotvoz70zz67zqvloxwcxz77zz76zbrz90zdz77zeycz82zz65zz73zq6z86z0z77z9">. This includes identifying high-impact use cases, evaluating and integrating first-party and third-party tools, and ensuring </span><span class=" author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qoxwovoz80zfz73zz75zz76zbexz75zhz122zz71zyolz72zbfz82zz76z87z90zez72zuz65z">solutions work seamlessly within the broader GTM ecosystem</span><span class=" author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qotvoz70zz67zqvloxwcxz77zz76zbrz90zdz77zeycz82zz65zz73zq6z86z0z77z9">.</span></p> <p><span class=" author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qotvoz70zz67zqvloxwcxz77zz76zbrz90zdz77zeycz82zz65zz73zq6z86z0z77z9">You will partner closely with engineering, technical architects, design, analytics, operations, and enablement to turn business needs into production-ready solutions that improve how sales, marketing, and customer teams operate day to day.</span></p> <p><span class=" author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qotvoz70zz67zqvloxwcxz77zz76zbrz90zdz77zeycz82zz65zz73zq6z86z0z77z9">You will own the product lifecycle from problem definition through execution and adoption, including rapid prototyping to explore and validate ideas. You will set priorities and make tradeoffs that balance speed with long-term system health.&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span class=" author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qotvoz70zz67zqvloxwcxz77zz76zbrz90zdz77zeycz82zz65zz73zq6z86z0z77z9">Success in this role requires strong product judgment, systems thinking, and a practical understanding of applied AI in operational environments.</span></p> <h2>Responsibilities</h2> <p><span class="ace-all-bold-hthree"><span class=" author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qotvoz70zz67zqvloxwcxz77zz76zbrz90zdz77zeycz82zz65zz73zq6z86z0z77z9"><strong>Shape and drive the AI roadmap and priorities for GTM systems</strong></span></span></p> <ul class="listtype-bullet listindent1 list-bullet1" data-testid="bullet-list" data-test-indentation="1"> <li><span class=" author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qotvoz70zz67zqvloxwcxz77zz76zbrz90zdz77zeycz82zz65zz73zq6z86z0z77z9">Define how AI is applied across customer-facing GTM workflows</span></li> <li><span class=" author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qotvoz70zz67zqvloxwcxz77zz76zbrz90zdz77zeycz82zz65zz73zq6z86z0z77z9">Identify, compare, and prioritize the highest-impact opportunities across sales, marketing, and customer success</span></li> <li><span class=" author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qotvoz70zz67zqvloxwcxz77zz76zbrz90zdz77zeycz82zz65zz73zq6z86z0z77z9">Balance near-term impact with longer-term platform capabilities such as decisioning and orchestration</span></li> </ul> <p><span class="ace-all-bold-hthree"><span class=" author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qotvoz70zz67zqvloxwcxz77zz76zbrz90zdz77zeycz82zz65zz73zq6z86z0z77z9"><strong>Define and operationalize AI-driven workflows</strong></span></span></p> <ul class="listtype-bullet listindent1 list-bullet1" data-testid="bullet-list" data-test-indentation="1"> <li><span class=" author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qotvoz70zz67zqvloxwcxz77zz76zbrz90zdz77zeycz82zz65zz73zq6z86z0z77z9">Shape how systems determine and trigger next best actions across the customer lifecycle</span></li> <li><span class=" author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qotvoz70zz67zqvloxwcxz77zz76zbrz90zdz77zeycz82zz65zz73zq6z86z0z77z9">Define how customer context, priority, and signals inform decisions and automation</span></li> <li><span class=" author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qotvoz70zz67zqvloxwcxz77zz76zbrz90zdz77zeycz82zz65zz73zq6z86z0z77z9">Establish when actions are handled by AI versus human teams, and how those interactions are coordinated</span></li> </ul> <p><span class="ace-all-bold-hthree"><span class=" author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qotvoz70zz67zqvloxwcxz77zz76zbrz90zdz77zeycz82zz65zz73zq6z86z0z77z9"><strong>Deliver AI-powered solutions end to end</strong></span></span></p> <ul jobs.title: Software Engineer, Growth (New Grad)
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong>About Mixpanel</strong></p> <p>Mixpanel turns data clarity into innovation. Trusted by more than 29,000 companies, including Workday, Pinterest, LG, and Rakuten Viber, Mixpanel’s AI-first digital analytics help teams accelerate adoption, improve retention, and ship with confidence. Powering this is an industry-leading platform that combines product and web analytics, session replay, experimentation, feature flags, and metric trees. Mixpanel delivers insights that customers trust. Visit <a href="mixpanel.com" target="_blank">mixpanel.com</a> to learn more.</p></div><h1><strong>About the Team</strong></h1> <p>The Growth Engineering team at Mixpanel is responsible for increasing user activation and driving self-serve revenue. We work closely with Product, Design, and Marketing to grow the funnel of customers landing on our platform, implementing Mixpanel, and seeing value fast. We move fast, experiment constantly, and measure everything.</p> <p>Within growth: this role is for the Top of Funnel Pod, a small crew specifically targeting user acquisition and activation. Some examples of what we’ve shipped lately:</p> <ul> <li>AI powered Template event suggestions</li> <li>Improving the discoverability of Templates</li> <li>AI install wizard - get set up and have your data flowing faster</li> </ul> <h1><strong>About the Role</strong></h1> <p>As a Software Engineer on the Growth team, you will build and optimize the experiences that drive user acquisition, activation, and conversion at Mixpanel. A key focus of this role is web experimentation — you'll design, implement, and analyze A/B tests across our marketing site and product onboarding flows to improve key growth metrics. You'll work across the full stack, from frontend UI changes to backend data pipelines, and collaborate with Product and Design to turn experiment insights into product improvements. This is a high-impact role where your work directly influences Mixpanel's top-of-funnel growth and self-serve revenue.</p> <h1><strong>Responsibilities</strong></h1> <ul> <li>Develop experiments across Mixpanel's product and onboarding flows to optimize acquisition and activation metrics</li> <li>Partner with Product and Design to identify high-impact experiment hypotheses grounded in data and user research</li> <li>Instrument tracking and build dashboards (in Mixpanel!) to measure experiment outcomes and inform iteration</li> <li>Build and improve onboarding experiences that drive down time to value for new Mixpanel users</li> <li>Participate in team on-call rotation to improve our systems and keep them healthy</li> </ul> <h1><strong>We're Looking For Someone Who Has</strong></h1> <ul> <li>Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Mathematics, a related field, or equivalent practical experience.</li> <li>Excellent debugging and technical investigation skills</li> <li>Strong technical communication, ideally with experience collaborating in an asynchronous remote environment</li> <li>Ability to move fast and iterate — you take ownership of problems and focus on delivering value to users</li> <li>A data-driven mindset</li> </ul> <h1><strong>Bonus Points For</strong></h1> <ul> <li>Interest in leveraging AI/GenAI to accelerate experimentation workflows</li> <li>React / TypeScript experience</li> <li>Django / Python experience</li> <li>Experience with experimentation platforms (e.g. Mixpanel, Optimizely, LaunchDarkly, Statsig, or similar)</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><strong>Compensation</strong></p> <p><span data-sheets-value="{&quot;1&quot;:2,&quot;2&quot;:&quot;The total target compensation (TTC) for this full-time position is $174,600 - $213,400 across the United States. This amount includes base compensation and variable compensation in the form of either a company bonus or commissions. Variable compensation type is determined by your role and level. This position is also eligible for equity consideration and other benefits including medical, vision, and dental insurance coverage. You can view our benefits offerings here.\n\nOur salary ranges are determined by role and level and are benchmarked to the SF Bay Area Technology data cut released by Radford, a global compensation database. The range displayed represents the minimum and maximum TTC for new hire salaries for the position across all of our US locations. To stay on top of market conditions, we refresh our salary ranges twice a year so these ranges may change in the future. Within the range, individual pay is determined by experience, job-related skills, qualifications, and other factors. If you have questions about the specific range, your recruiter can share this information.&quot;}" data-sheets-userformat="{&quot;2&quot;:769,&quot;3&quot;:{&quot;1&quot;:0},&quot;11&quot;:4,&quot;12&quot;:0}">The amount listed below is the total target cash compensation (TTCC) and includes base compensation and variable compensation in the form of either a company bonus or commissions. Variable compensation type is determined by your role and level. In addition to the cash compensation provided, this position is also eligible for equity consideration and other benefits including medical, vision, and dental insurance coverage. You can view our benefits offerings <a href="https://mxpnl.notion.site/Check-out-our-benefits-869112a6cabe4c81a2b9da99de28f636" target="_blank">here</a>.<br><br>Our salary ranges are determined by role and level and are benchmarked to the SF Bay Area Technology data cut released by Radford, a global compensation database. The range displayed represents the minimum and maximum TTCC for new hire salaries for the position across all of our US locations. To stay on top of market conditions, we refresh our salary ranges twice a year so these ranges may change in the future. Within the range, individual pay is determined by experience, job-related skills, qualifications, and other factors. If you have questions about the specific range, your recruiter can share this information.</span></p></div><div class="title">Mixpanel Compensation Range</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$157,500</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$213,000 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong>Benefits and Perks</strong><strong><br></strong></p> <ul> <li>Comprehensive Medical, Vision, and Dental Care</li> <li>Mental Wellness Benefit</li> <li>Generous Vacation Policy &amp; Additional Company Holidays</li> <li>Enhanced Parental Leave</li> <li>Volunteer Time Off</li> <li>Additional US Benefits: Pre-Tax Benefits including 401(K), Wellness Benefit, Holiday Break</li> </ul> <p><em>*please note that benefits and perks for contract positions will vary*</em></p> <p><strong>Culture Values</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>Make Bold Bets:</strong> We choose courageous action over comfortable progress.</li> <li><strong>Innovate with Insight:</strong> We tackle decisions with rigor and judgment - combining data, experience and collective wisdom to drive&nbsp;powerful outcomes.</li> <li><strong>One Team:</strong> We collaborate across boundaries to achieve far greater impact than any of us could accomplish alone.</li> <li><strong>Candor with Connection:</strong> We build meaningful relationships that enable honest feedback and direct conversations.</li> <li><strong>Champion the Customer:</strong> We seek to deeply understand our customers’ needs, ensuring their success is our north star.</li> <li><strong>Powerful Simplicity:</strong> We find elegant solutions to complex problems, making sophisticated things accessible.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Why choose Mixpanel?</strong></p> <p>We’re a leader in analytics with over 9,000 customers and $277M raised from prominent investors: like Andreessen-Horowitz, Sequoia, YC, and, most recently, Bain Capital. Mixpanel’s pioneering event-based data analytics platform offers a powerful yet simple solution for companies to understand user behaviors and easily track overarching company success metrics. Our accomplished teams continuously facilitate our expansion by tackling the ever-evolving challenges tied to scaling, reliability, design, and service. Choosing to work at Mixpanel means you’ll be helping the world’s most innovative companies learn from their data so they can make better decisions.</p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Mixpanel is an equal opportunity employer supporting workforce diversity. At Mixpanel, we are focused on things that really matter—our people, our customers, our partners—out of a recognition that those relationships are the most valuable assets we have. We actively encourage women, people with disabilities, veterans, underrepresented minorities, and LGBTQ+ people to apply. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status. Pursuant to the San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance or other similar laws that may be applicable, we will consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records. We’ve immersed ourselves in our Culture and Values as our guiding principles for the impact we want to have and the future we are building.</span></p></div>

jobs.title: Product Manager, Crypto Trading
jobs.location: Menlo Park, CA; New York, NY
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><h2>Join us in building the future of finance.</h2> <p>Our mission is to democratize finance for all. <a href="https://www.cerulli.com/press-releases/cerulli-anticipates-124-trillion-in-wealth-will-transfer-through-2048" target="_blank">An estimated $124 trillion of assets</a> will be inherited by younger generations in the next two decades. The largest transfer of wealth in human history. If you’re ready to be at the epicenter of this historic cultural and financial shift, keep reading.</p></div><h2><strong>About the team + role</strong></h2> <p>As a product manager on the Crypto team, <strong>you’ll be responsible for building the next generation of crypto trading experiences.</strong> You will own high-impact initiatives across trading UX, advanced order types, exchange integrations, smart order routing, liquidity partnerships, and market structure innovation. Your work will directly improve execution quality and elevate Robinhood’s capabilities for sophisticated and professional crypto traders.</p> <p>You will also lead the development of crypto-native functionality, building CeDeFi experiences that embed onchain products directly into the Robinhood retail app, powered by DeFi backends and blockchain infrastructure. From staking to new liquidity and yield mechanisms, you’ll help bridge centralized and decentralized finance within a seamless, custodial experience.</p> <p><strong>This role is based in our Menlo Park, CA or New York City, NY office, with in-person attendance expected at least 3 days per week.</strong></p> <p>At Robinhood, we believe in the power of in-person work to accelerate progress, spark innovation, and strengthen community. Our office experience is intentional, energizing, and designed to fully support high-performing teams.&nbsp;</p> <h2><strong>What you’ll do</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Define and drive the strategy to make Robinhood the leading platform for sophisticated and professional crypto traders.</li> <li>Lead cross-functional teams (engineering, design, data, research, operations, and marketing) to identify high-impact opportunities across trading UX, execution quality, liquidity access, and market structure.</li> <li>Ship advanced trading capabilities, exchange integrations, and routing improvements that measurably enhance performance and reliability.</li> <li>Build and scale crypto-native CeDeFi experiences — embedding onchain products, staking, and DeFi-powered functionality directly into the Robinhood app.</li> <li>Use research, experimentation, and product analytics to inform decisions and continuously improve trading outcomes.</li> <li>Deliver high-quality products with speed and rigor in a fast-moving, highly dynamic market environment.</li> </ul> <h2><strong>What you bring</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Bachelor’s, Master's, or equivalent experience</li> <li>3+ years experience in a consumer facing product management role&nbsp;</li> <li>At least 1 year of shipping crypto products</li> <li>Familiarity using research, experimentation and product analytics to guide decision making</li> <li>Ability to balance strategic with creative decision making</li> <li>A strong sense of urgency and speed</li> <li>High standards and a strong work ethic - you always bring your best and expect your colleagues to do the same</li> <li>Delight in bringing innovation and impact to customers, particularly in complex and dynamic environments</li> <li>Experience in Crypto products</li> </ul> <h2><strong>What we offer</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Market competitive and pay equity-focused compensation structure</li> <li>100% paid health insurance for employees with 90% coverage for dependents</li> <li>Annual lifestyle wallet for personal wellness, learning and development, and more!</li> <li>Lifetime maximum benefit for family forming and fertility benefits</li> <li>Dedicated mental health support for employees and eligible dependents</li> <li>Generous time away including company holidays, paid time off, sick time, parental leave, and more!</li> <li>Lively office environment with catered meals, fully stocked kitchens, and geo-specific commuter benefits</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><strong>In addition to the base pay range listed below, this role is also eligible for bonus opportunities + equity + benefits.</strong></p> <p>Base pay for the successful applicant will depend on a variety of job-related factors, which may include education, training, experience, location, business needs, or market demands. The expected base pay range for this role is based on the location where the work will be performed and is aligned to one of 3 compensation zones. For other locations not listed, compensation can be discussed with your recruiter during the interview process.</p> <p><span style="text-decoration: underline;">Base Pay Range:</span></p></div><div class="title">Zone 1 (Menlo Park, CA; New York, NY; Bellevue, WA; Washington, DC)</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$140,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$165,000 USD</span></div></div><div class="pay-input"><div class="title">Zone 2 (Denver, CO; Westlake, TX; Chicago, IL)</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$123,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$145,000 USD</span></div></div><div class="pay-input"><div class="title">Zone 3 (Lake Mary, FL; Clearwater, FL; Gainesville, FL)</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$110,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$129,000 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p>Click <a href="https://careers.robinhood.com/benefits" target="_blank">here</a> to learn more about our Total Rewards, which vary by region and entity.</p> <p>If our mission energizes you and you’re ready to build the future of finance, we look forward to seeing your application.</p> <p>Robinhood provides equal opportunity for all applicants, offers reasonable accommodations upon request, and complies with applicable equal employment and privacy laws. Inclusion is built into how we hire and work—welcoming different backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences so everyone can do their best. Please review the&nbsp;<a href="https://careers.robinhood.com/applicantprivacypolicy" target="_blank">Privacy Policy</a> for your country of application.</p></div>

jobs.title: Software Engineering Manager
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><h2>Join us in building the future of finance.</h2> <p>Our mission is to democratize finance for all. <a href="https://www.cerulli.com/press-releases/cerulli-anticipates-124-trillion-in-wealth-will-transfer-through-2048" target="_blank">An estimated $124 trillion of assets</a> will be inherited by younger generations in the next two decades. The largest transfer of wealth in human history. If you’re ready to be at the epicenter of this historic cultural and financial shift, keep reading.</p></div><h2>About the team</h2> <p data-start="0" data-end="472">We are building an elite team, applying frontier technologies to the world’s biggest financial problems. We’re looking for bold thinkers. Sharp problem-solvers. Builders who are wired to make an impact. Robinhood isn’t a place for complacency, it’s where ambitious people do the best work of their careers. We’re a high-performing, fast-moving team with ethics at the center of everything we do. Expectations are high, and so are the rewards.</p> <p data-start="474" data-end="976">The <strong>Equities</strong> Engineering team builds and operates the systems that power stock trading for millions of customers. The team focuses on order management, execution, market data, and reliability, ensuring trades are processed accurately and with low latency. You’ll work closely with product, data, and infrastructure partners to deliver systems that meet strict performance and regulatory requirements. We value clear communication, measurable outcomes, and a strong sense of ownership across the team!</p> <p data-start="978" data-end="1496">As an Engineering Manager, you will lead a team responsible for delivering and maintaining critical equities trading systems. You will set clear goals, guide technical direction, and support engineers in delivering reliable, scalable services. You will partner with product and business teams to translate requirements into execution plans, ensuring systems meet performance, accuracy, and compliance standards. Your work will directly impact the quality and reliability of the trading experience for customers!</p> <p data-start="1498" data-end="1600"><strong>This role is based in our Menlo Park, CA office, with in-person attendance expected 5 days per week.</strong></p> <p data-start="1602" data-end="1830">At Robinhood, we believe in the power of in-person work to accelerate progress, spark innovation, and strengthen community. Our office experience is intentional, energizing, and designed to fully support high-performing teams.</p> <h2>What you'll do</h2> <ul> <li data-start="1832" data-end="2448">Lead a team of engineers to deliver reliable equities trading systems with clear uptime and latency targets</li> <li data-start="1832" data-end="2448">Set quarterly goals and track progress using defined metrics such as system availability, order throughput, and incident response time</li> <li data-start="1832" data-end="2448">Partner with product managers and business stakeholders to define requirements and deliver features on schedule</li> <li data-start="1832" data-end="2448">Review system architecture and guide design decisions to improve scalability, fault tolerance, and performance</li> <li data-start="1832" data-end="2448">Support hiring, onboarding, and development of engineers through regular feedback and structured growth plans</li> </ul> <h2>What you bring</h2> <ul> <li data-start="2450" data-end="2958">Experience managing engineering teams that build and operate high-availability backend systems</li> <li data-start="2450" data-end="2958">Ability to define and track measurable goals such as service uptime, latency, and delivery timelines</li> <li data-start="2450" data-end="2958">Strong technical background in distributed systems, APIs, and data-intensive applications</li> <li data-start="2450" data-end="2958">Experience working on financial systems, trading platforms, or other regulated environments</li> <li data-start="2450" data-end="2958">Clear communication skills with the ability to explain technical decisions and trade-offs</li> </ul> <h2>Leadership expectations</h2> <p data-start="2991" data-end="3103">Our ambitious roadmap requires a great culture shaped by exceptional leaders. Here’s what we expect from them:</p> <ul> <li data-start="3105" data-end="3270">Drive high performance by setting clear, focused goals, giving real-time feedback, stretching top talent, and scaling impact through focus, innovation, and tech.</li> <li data-start="3272" data-end="3431">Hire and retain top talent by setting a high bar, hiring only those who raise it, investing in onboarding, and addressing talent issues quickly and fairly.</li> <li data-start="3433" data-end="3602">Create community by connecting work to purpose, removing friction while prioritizing safety, building trust and inclusion, and leading from the front with integrity.</li> </ul> <h2>What we offer</h2> <ul> <li>Challenging, high-impact work to grow your career</li> <li>Performance driven compensation with multipliers for outsized impact, bonus programs, equity ownership, and 401(k) matching</li> <li>Best in class benefits to fuel your work, including 100% paid health insurance for employees with 90% coverage for dependents</li> <li>Lifestyle wallet - a highly flexible benefits spending account for wellness, learning, and more</li> <li>Employer-paid life &amp; disability insurance, fertility benefits, and mental health benefits</li> <li>Time off to recharge including company holidays, paid time off, sick time, parental leave, and more!</li> <li>Exceptional office experience with catered meals, events, and comfortable workspaces.</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><strong>In addition to the base pay range listed below, this role is also eligible for bonus opportunities + equity + benefits.</strong></p> <p>Base pay for the successful applicant will depend on a variety of job-related factors, which may include education, training, experience, location, business needs, or market demands. The expected base pay range for this role is based on the location where the work will be performed and is aligned to one of 3 compensation zones. For other locations not listed, compensation can be discussed with your recruiter during the interview process.</p> <p><span style="text-decoration: underline;">Base Pay Range:</span></p></div><div class="title">Zone 1 (Menlo Park, CA; New York, NY; Bellevue, WA; Washington, DC)</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$230,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$270,000 USD</span></div></div><div class="pay-input"><div class="title">Zone 2 (Denver, CO; Westlake, TX; Chicago, IL)</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$203,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$238,000 USD</span></div></div><div class="pay-input"><div class="title">Zone 3 (Lake Mary, FL; Clearwater, FL; Gainesville, FL)</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$180,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$211,000 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p>Click <a href="https://careers.robinhood.com/benefits" target="_blank">here</a> to learn more about our Total Rewards, which vary by region and entity.</p> <p>If our mission energizes you and you’re ready to build the future of finance, we look forward to seeing your application.</p> <p>Robinhood provides equal opportunity for all applicants, offers reasonable accommodations upon request, and complies with applicable equal employment and privacy laws. Inclusion is built into how we hire and work—welcoming different backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences so everyone can do their best. Please review the&nbsp;<a href="https://careers.robinhood.com/applicantprivacypolicy" target="_blank">Privacy Policy</a> for your country of application.</p></div>

jobs.title: Technical Program Manager, Cloud Inference
jobs.location: San Francisco, CA | New York City, NY
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><h2><strong>About Anthropic</strong></h2> <p>Anthropic’s mission is to create reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems. We want AI to be safe and beneficial for our users and for society as a whole. Our team is a quickly growing group of committed researchers, engineers, policy experts, and business leaders working together to build beneficial AI systems.</p></div><h2 class="heading"><strong>About the Role</strong></h2> <p>We are seeking an experienced Technical Program Manager to support our critical cloud deployments. In this role you will be an execution owner, driving coordination and collaboration across multiple engineering teams. You will also support the collaboration and technical execution between our internal engineering teams and our major cloud partners including Amazon Bedrock, Google Vertex, and Microsoft Foundry.</p> <p>Your primary focus will be on ensuring tight coordination on engineering deliverables both within our internal teams and between our partner teams, enabling repeatable and efficient product development and launch pipelines for our AI models on third-party platforms. You will be responsible for aligning a range of business and technical stakeholders to drive execution of technical roadmaps, with a particular emphasis on optimizing our presence and performance.</p> <p>This position offers the opportunity to make a significant impact on Anthropic's growth and success in the cloud AI market, while working at the forefront of AI development and innovation.</p> <h2 class="heading"><strong>Responsibilities</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Partner with engineering leaders to define, scope, and sequence major technical initiatives for cloud partnerships and AI model deployment, and own the plans, timelines, and resourcing to land them.</li> <li>Own launch readiness for Claude models on partner cloud platforms: checklist, blocker tracking, joint go/no-go with the partner, and post-launch stability follow-through.</li> <li>Act as the primary technical interface to cloud partner engineering orgs — owning the relationship, the shared roadmap, and day-to-day coordination on deployment, capacity, and incidents.</li> <li>Drive cross-functional alignment across internal engineering, product, and go-to-market teams to land joint deliverables with the partner.</li> <li>Provide clear and transparent reporting on program status, issues, and risks to executives and stakeholders.</li> </ul> <h2><strong>You may be a good fit if you</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Have several years of experience in technical program management, with a track record of successfully delivering complex technical programs, preferably involving cloud platforms and AI technologies.</li> <li>Have strong understanding of cloud computing architectures, AI/ML deployment, and integration challenges.</li> <li>Have exceptional interpersonal and communication skills, enabling you to influence without authority and build cross-organizational support.</li> <li>Have a high threshold for navigating ambiguity and ability to balance strategic priorities with rapid, high-quality execution.</li> <li>Thrive in fast-paced, scaling environments with the ability to bring order to chaos.</li> <li>Are passionate about Anthropic's mission and committed to ensuring AI is developed safely.</li> </ul> <h2><strong>Strong candidates may also have</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Direct experience with a hyperscaler's managed AI platform — Amazon Bedrock, Google Vertex AI, or Azure AI Foundry — including how partners list, launch, and onboard customers on it.</li> <li>Background in ML inference, model serving infrastructure, or accelerator-based compute.</li> <li>Have owned joint engineering roadmap or dependency tracking, driving incident follow-through, and converting open issues into a prioritized plan both sides commit to</li> <li>Experience with release engineering, deployment automation, or CI/CD for systems that ship to multiple targets or environments.</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p>The annual compensation range for this role is listed below.&nbsp;</p> <p>For sales roles, the range provided is the role’s On Target Earnings ("OTE") range, meaning that the range includes both the sales commissions/sales bonuses target and annual base salary for the role.</p></div><div class="title">Annual Salary:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$290,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$435,000 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><h2><strong>Logistics</strong></h2> <p><strong>Minimum education: </strong>Bachelor’s degree or an equivalent combination of education, training, and/or experience</p> <p><strong>Required field of study:&nbsp;</strong>A field relevant to the role as demonstrated through coursework, training, or professional experience</p> <p><strong>Minimum years of experience: </strong>Years of experience required will correlate with the internal job level requirements for the position</p> <p><strong>Location-based hybrid policy:</strong> Currently, we expect all staff to be in one of our offices at least 25% of the time. However, some roles may require more time in our offices.</p> <p><strong data-stringify-type="bold">Visa sponsorship:</strong>&nbsp;We do sponsor visas! However, we aren't able to successfully sponsor visas for every role and every candidate. But if we make you an offer, we will make every reasonable effort to get you a visa, and we retain an immigration lawyer to help with this.</p> <p><strong>We encourage you to apply even if you do not believe you meet every single qualification.</strong> Not all strong candidates will meet every single qualification as listed.&nbsp; Research shows that people who identify as being from underrepresented groups are more prone to experiencing imposter syndrome and doubting the strength of their candidacy, so we urge you not to exclude yourself prematurely and to submit an application if you're interested in this work. We think AI systems like the ones we're building have enormous social and ethical implications. We think this makes representation even more important, and we strive to include a range of diverse perspectives on our team.<br><br><strong data-stringify-type="bold">Your safety matters to us.</strong> To protect yourself from potential scams, remember that Anthropic recruiters only contact you from&nbsp;@anthropic.com&nbsp;email addresses. In some cases, we may partner with vetted recruiting agencies who will identify themselves as working on behalf of Anthropic. Be cautious of emails from other domains. Legitimate Anthropic recruiters will never ask for money, fees, or banking information before your first day. If you're ever unsure about a communication, don't click any links—visit&nbsp;<u data-stringify-type="underline"><a class="c-link c-link--underline" href="http://anthropic.com/careers" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="http://anthropic.com/careers" data-sk="tooltip_parent" data-remove-tab-index="true">anthropic.com/careers</a></u>&nbsp;directly for confirmed position openings.</p> <h2><strong>How we're different</strong></h2> <p>We believe that the highest-impact AI research will be big science. At Anthropic we work as a single cohesive team on just a few large-scale research efforts. And we value impact — advancing our long-term goals of steerable, trustworthy AI — rather than work on smaller and more specific puzzles. We view AI research as an empirical science, which has as much in common with physics and biology as with traditional efforts in computer science. We're an extremely collaborative group, and we host frequent research discussions to ensure that we are pursuing the highest-impact work at any given time. As such, we greatly value communication skills.</p> <p>The easiest way to understand our research directions is to read our recent research. This research continues many of the directions our team worked on prior to Anthropic, including: GPT-3, Circuit-Based Interpretability, Multimodal Neurons, Scaling Laws, AI &amp; Compute, Concrete Problems in AI Safety, and Learning from Human Preferences.</p> <h2><strong>Come work with us!</strong></h2> <p>Anthropic is a public benefit corporation headquartered in San Francisco. We offer competitive compensation and benefits, optional equity donation matching, generous vacation and parental leave, flexible working hours, and a lovely office space in which to collaborate with colleagues. <strong data-stringify-type="bold">Guidance on Candidates' AI Usage:</strong>&nbsp;Learn about&nbsp;<a class="c-link" href="https://www.anthropic.com/candidate-ai-guidance" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="https://www.anthropic.com/candidate-ai-guidance" data-sk="tooltip_parent">our policy</a>&nbsp;for using AI in our application process</p></div>

jobs.title: Product and Platform Partnerships, Business Development
jobs.description: <h2 class="p1"><span class="s1">Role Description</span></h2> <p>The Dropbox <span class=" author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qowz80zsz81z8nqz122zdfz68z5coz87zsz73zz76zipqu3z86zmz88zz81zcthz87zz87z">Business Development</span> team develops and manages 3rd-party relationships on behalf of the company to deliver high-impact partnerships that generate material revenue and enable our product strategy. We work with a variety of partners, including hardware and software providers, strategic partners, and distribution partners.</p> <p>Dropbox is seeking an ambitious <span class=" author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qowz80zsz81z8nqz122zdfz68z5coz87zsz73zz76zipqu3z86zmz88zz81zcthz87zz87z">Product and Platform Partnerships </span>Manager who is passionate about technology and business strategy to own and lead a portfolio of our most strategic partnerships. In addition to relationship management and negotiation experience, this position requires critical thinking, creativity, project management, and execution skills, as you'll be called upon to conceive and drive major partner initiatives while working cross-functionally with our Product, Sales, Marketing, Legal, and Finance teams. &nbsp;This individual will play a crucial role in the success of our product strategy and revenue targets by:</p> <p>1) <span class=" author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qowz80zsz81z8nqz122zdfz68z5coz87zsz73zz76zipqu3z86zmz88zz81zcthz87zz87z">Building and managing thriving product partner ecosystems around new platforms and products&nbsp;</span></p> <p>2) Identifying ways to find product market fit and increase reach<span class=" author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qowz80zsz81z8nqz122zdfz68z5coz87zsz73zz76zipqu3z86zmz88zz81zcthz87zz87z"> through these product partnerships</span>&nbsp;</p> <p>3) Working closely with our product team to define the future of Dropbox via AI/ML partnerships</p> <h2 class="p1"><span class="s1">Responsibilities</span></h2> <ul> <li>Play an integral role in driving the <span class=" author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qowz80zsz81z8nqz122zdfz68z5coz87zsz73zz76zipqu3z86zmz88zz81zcthz87zz87z">product and platform partnerships </span>strategy by identifying new opportunities for partnerships across Dropbox’s current and future product lines.</li> <li>Focus on AI/ML partnerships, both inbound <span class=" h-lparen">(bolstering</span> Dropbox’s products with AI) and outbound <span class=" h-lparen">(integrating</span> Dropbox in to other AI driven platforms)</li> <li>Work cross-functionally with Product and Engineering leaders to define priorities and roadmaps and execute on the strategy for <span class=" author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qowz80zsz81z8nqz122zdfz68z5coz87zsz73zz76zipqu3z86zmz88zz81zcthz87zz87z">partner-led or partner-involved initiatives</span>. Work will include product alignment, business case, negotiations, integration development, GTM plans, and account management.</li> <li>Build joint business plans with our partners for initiatives, including end-to-end GTM plans as well as a robust set of KPIs, success metrics, joint accountability and governance.&nbsp;</li> <li>Manage technical and business negotiations, and partner with our legal team to develop and negotiate custom partnership agreements and repeatable templates to scale to broader ecosystem partnerships.</li> <li>Work cross-functionally and collaborate with all levels of management internally and externally to build and maintain mutually beneficial partnerships.</li> </ul> <h2 class="p1"><span class="s1">Requirements</span></h2> <ul> <li><span class=" author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qowz80zsz81z8nqz122zdfz68z5coz87zsz73zz76zipqu3z86zmz88zz81zcthz87zz87z">8</span>+ years of experience in business development or partnership management.&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience with AI/ML partnerships&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience with SaaS.</li> <li>A hardworking <span class=" h-ldquo">“0</span> to 1 deal-maker” who has brought a number of impactful <span class=" author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qowz80zsz81z8nqz122zdfz68z5coz87zsz73zz76zipqu3z86zmz88zz81zcthz87zz87z">product partnerships</span> to life from conception to execution.</li> <li>Exceptional presentation, communication, and interpersonal skills.</li> <li>Adept at understanding and contributing to conversations with colleagues in technical functions around product specifications.</li> <li>Motivated, self-directed, and confident individual contributor who can thrive in a dynamic environment. You maintain composure in high pressure and ambiguous situations.</li> <li>Ability to develop, review and negotiate complex contracts and familiarity with standard deal structures.</li> <li>Strong organization, prioritization, and project management skills.</li> <li>Structured and analytical thinker with the ability to distill complex issues into structured frameworks and concrete plans.</li> <li>Undergraduate degree</li> </ul> <h2>Preferred Qualifications</h2> <ul> <li>MBA and/or management consulting background</li> </ul> <h2 data-usually-unique-id="044234883370604133046166"><span class=" author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qowz81zqz90zkz74zz76zeez80zz68zz89zz88zvqz86zuxlz73zexxz80zz73z6d6z72zz79zsz77z">Compensation</span></h2><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><span style="font-size: 16px;">US Zone 1</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 16px;">This role is not available in Zone 1</span></p></div><div class="title">US Zone 2</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$162,200</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$219,400 USD</span></div></div><div class="pay-input"><div class="title">US Zone 3</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$144,200</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$195,000 USD</span></div></div></div>

jobs.title: Analytics Developer
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><h2>Join us in building the future of finance.</h2> <p>Our mission is to democratize finance for all. <a href="https://www.cerulli.com/press-releases/cerulli-anticipates-124-trillion-in-wealth-will-transfer-through-2048" target="_blank">An estimated $124 trillion of assets</a> will be inherited by younger generations in the next two decades. The largest transfer of wealth in human history. If you’re ready to be at the epicenter of this historic cultural and financial shift, keep reading.</p></div><h2><strong>About the team + role</strong></h2> <p data-start="29" data-end="490">We are building an elite team, applying frontier technologies to the world’s biggest financial problems. We’re looking for bold thinkers. Sharp problem-solvers. Builders who are focused on delivering meaningful results. Robinhood isn’t a place for complacency, it’s where ambitious people do the best work of their careers. We’re a high-performing, fast-moving team with ethics at the center of everything we do. Expectations are high, and so are the rewards.</p> <p data-start="492" data-end="895">Robinhood’s Analytics Engineering team, part of the Data Science organization, builds the data foundation that supports decision-making across the company. The team develops data products that support product development, regulatory requirements, and business operations. You will work closely with product managers, engineers, and data scientists to transform raw data into reliable, usable datasets.</p> <p data-start="897" data-end="1298">As an Analytics Engineer, you will design and build ETL pipelines, data models, and analytics tools that support key business decisions. You will contribute to defining metrics, improving dataset quality, and establishing standards for analytics development. This role offers the opportunity to influence how teams access and use data across Robinhood while supporting systems that operate at scale!</p> <p data-start="1300" data-end="1408">This role is based in our Toronto, ON office, with in-person attendance expected at least 3 days per week.</p> <p data-start="1410" data-end="1638">At Robinhood, we believe in the power of in-person work to accelerate progress, spark innovation, and strengthen community. Our office experience is intentional, energizing, and designed to fully support high-performing teams.</p> <h2><strong>What you’ll do</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Work with product, engineering, and data science teams to define metrics and deliver analytics solutions, from data ingestion to reporting</li> <li>Design and maintain scalable ETL pipelines and data models using tools such as Airflow and Spark</li> <li>Build analytics products that support business, product, and regulatory reporting needs</li> <li>Develop internal tools and frameworks to improve data accessibility and usability across teams</li> <li>Partner with data scientists to turn raw data into insights that inform product and business decisions</li> <li>Promote consistent analytics practices and support teams in using data effectively</li> </ul> <h2><strong>What you bring&nbsp;</strong></h2> <ul> <li>You have 3+ years of experience in analytics engineering, data engineering, data science, or a related field</li> <li>You have strong experience with SQL, Python, and Apache Spark for data processing</li> <li>You have experience building and maintaining ETL pipelines using tools such as Airflow or similar</li> <li>You have experience creating dashboards using tools such as Superset, Looker, or Tableau</li> <li>You are familiar with version control systems like Git and modern development workflows</li> <li>You can work effectively with partners across engineering, product, and data teams</li> </ul> <h2><strong>What we offer</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Challenging, high-impact work to grow your career</li> <li>Performance driven compensation with multipliers for outsized impact, bonus programs, and equity ownership</li> <li>Top tier benefits to fuel your work, including supplemental health insurance, ancillary insurance, and mental health support programs</li> <li>Lifestyle wallet - a highly flexible employer-paid benefits spending account expenses beyond traditional benefits such as wellness, childcare, learning, and more.</li> <li>Time off to recharge including company holidays, paid time off, sick time, paid volunteer time off, parental leave, and more!</li> <li>Exceptional office experience with catered meals, events, and comfortable workspaces.</li> <li>Monthly commuter stipend to help offset in-office commuting costs</li> </ul> <p data-start="3667" data-end="4036">Our team is committed to providing an inclusive and welcoming interview experience for all candidates. If you require a specific accommodation during the application or interview process due to a physical or mental condition, please complete this Applicant Accommodation Form to notify our team. The form should only be completed if you need a specific accommodation.</p> <p data-start="4038" data-end="4288">AI Usage Disclosure: Robinhood uses artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of our recruiting process. These tools enhance the efficiency and consistency of our hiring process; however, all hiring decisions are made by our hiring teams.</p> <p data-start="4290" data-end="4393">Vacancy Notice: This job posting represents an existing vacancy that we are actively seeking to fill.</p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><strong>In addition to the base pay range listed below, this role is also eligible for bonus opportunities + equity + benefits.</strong></p> <p>Base pay for the successful applicant will depend on a variety of job-related factors, which may include education, training, experience, location, business needs, or market demands. The expected base pay range for this role is based on the location where the work will be performed.</p> <p><span style="text-decoration: underline;">Base Pay Range:</span></p></div><div class="title">Toronto, ON</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$145,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$170,000 CAD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p>Click <a href="https://careers.robinhood.com/benefits" target="_blank">here</a> to learn more about our Total Rewards, which vary by region and entity.</p> <p>If our mission energizes you and you’re ready to build the future of finance, we look forward to seeing your application.</p> <p>Robinhood provides equal opportunity for all applicants, offers reasonable accommodations upon request, and complies with applicable equal employment and privacy laws. Inclusion is built into how we hire and work—welcoming different backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences so everyone can do their best. Please review the&nbsp;<a href="https://careers.robinhood.com/applicantprivacypolicy" target="_blank">Privacy Policy</a> for your country of application.</p></div>

jobs.title: Android Developer
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><h2>Join us in building the future of finance.</h2> <p>Our mission is to democratize finance for all. <a href="https://www.cerulli.com/press-releases/cerulli-anticipates-124-trillion-in-wealth-will-transfer-through-2048" target="_blank">An estimated $124 trillion of assets</a> will be inherited by younger generations in the next two decades. The largest transfer of wealth in human history. If you’re ready to be at the epicenter of this historic cultural and financial shift, keep reading.</p></div><p><strong>About the team + role</strong></p> <p>We are building an elite team, applying frontier technologies to the world’s biggest financial problems.<strong> </strong>We’re looking for bold thinkers. Sharp problem-solvers. Builders who are wired to make an impact. Robinhood isn’t a place for complacency, it’s where ambitious people do the best work of their careers. We’re a high-performing, fast-moving team with ethics at the center of everything we do. Expectations are high, and so are the rewards.&nbsp;</p> <p>We’re excited to invite talented and motivated Android Developers to join our award-winning team to help expand Robinhood’s mobile experience for our customers.</p> <p class="wnfdnte" data-pm-slice="1 1 []">The <strong>Margins team</strong> powers the experience that lets Robinhood customers responsibly borrow against their portfolios and trade with leverage. They own the end-to-end margin platform—eligibility, real-time margin calculations, interest, risk controls, and liquidation logic—so customers can access buying power while the firm stays safe in a highly regulated, high-stakes environment.</p> <p class="wnfdnte">As an <strong>Android Engineer on Margins</strong>, you’ll turn complex trading and risk concepts into clear, trustworthy mobile experiences. You’ll partner closely with backend, product, design, and risk to ship performant features in Kotlin and modern Android tooling, designing flows that explain margin clearly, surface risk intuitively, and meet Robinhood’s high bar for safety, quality, and user experience.</p> <p>The role is based in our <strong>Toronto, Canada</strong> office, with in-person attendance expected at least <strong>3 days per week</strong>.</p> <p>At Robinhood, we believe in the power of in-person work to accelerate progress, spark innovation, and strengthen community. Our office experience is intentional, energizing, and designed to fully support high-performing teams.&nbsp;</p> <h2><strong>What you’ll do</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Work with a fast-growing team to revolutionize finance at speed and scale</li> <li>Build smooth, stable, and elegant products with Kotlin and the newest Android APIs</li> <li>Own features from inception to design, implementation, and launch</li> <li>Work cross-functionally with Product Designers, Product Managers, Backend Developers, and Data team</li> <li>Work with Kotlin, Android SDK &amp; Jetpack Compose, MVVM, Coroutines &amp; Flow (preferred) OR RxJava, and Retrofit &amp; Room</li> </ul> <h2><strong>What you bring</strong></h2> <ul> <li>3+ years of professional Android development experience building consumer Android applications at scale, preferably in Kotlin and Compose</li> <li>Attention to detail, passion for writing clean, readable and maintainable code</li> <li>Proficiency in Kotlin or Java, and Jetpack</li> <li>Desire to improve Robinhood's app and codebase to ensure outstanding quality for our all users</li> <li>Strong product sense and ability to collaborate with Product Managers and Designers</li> <li>Excellent communication skills and passion for solving technical challenges</li> <li>Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or a related field preferred; equivalent training or work experience also acceptable</li> </ul> <h2><strong>What we offer</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Challenging, high-impact work to grow your career</li> <li>Performance driven compensation with multipliers for outsized impact, bonus programs, and equity ownership</li> <li>Top tier benefits to fuel your work, including supplemental health insurance, ancillary insurance, and mental health support programs</li> <li>Lifestyle wallet - a highly flexible employer-paid benefits spending account expenses beyond traditional benefits such as wellness, childcare, learning, and more.</li> <li>Time off to recharge including company holidays, paid time off, sick time, paid volunteer time off, parental leave, and more!</li> <li>Exceptional office experience with catered meals, events, and comfortable workspaces.&nbsp;</li> <li>Monthly commuter stipend to help offset in-office commuting costs</li> </ul> <p>Our team is committed to providing an inclusive and welcoming interview experience for all candidates. If you require a specific accommodation during the application or interview process due to a physical or mental condition, please complete this<a href="https://robinhood.hracuity.net/webform/index/752875e4-42ba-4dff-9951-fd51e315997e"> Applicant Accommodation Form</a> to notify our team. The form should only be completed if you need a specific accommodation.</p> <p><strong>AI Usage Disclosure:</strong> Robinhood uses artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of our recruiting process. These tools enhance the efficiency and consistency of our hiring process; however, all hiring decisions are made by our hiring teams.</p> <h4><strong>Vacancy Notice: </strong>This job posting represents an existing vacancy that we are actively seeking to fill.</h4><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><strong>In addition to the base pay range listed below, this role is also eligible for bonus opportunities + equity + benefits.</strong></p> <p>Base pay for the successful applicant will depend on a variety of job-related factors, which may include education, training, experience, location, business needs, or market demands. The expected base pay range for this role is based on the location where the work will be performed.</p> <p><span style="text-decoration: underline;">Base Pay Range:</span></p></div><div class="title">Toronto, ON</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$136,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$160,000 CAD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p>Click <a href="https://careers.robinhood.com/benefits" target="_blank">here</a> to learn more about our Total Rewards, which vary by region and entity.</p> <p>If our mission energizes you and you’re ready to build the future of finance, we look forward to seeing your application.</p> <p>Robinhood provides equal opportunity for all applicants, offers reasonable accommodations upon request, and complies with applicable equal employment and privacy laws. Inclusion is built into how we hire and work—welcoming different backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences so everyone can do their best. Please review the&nbsp;<a href="https://careers.robinhood.com/applicantprivacypolicy" target="_blank">Privacy Policy</a> for your country of application.</p></div>

jobs.title: Software Developer, Infrastructure
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><h2>Join us in building the future of finance.</h2> <p>Our mission is to democratize finance for all. <a href="https://www.cerulli.com/press-releases/cerulli-anticipates-124-trillion-in-wealth-will-transfer-through-2048" target="_blank">An estimated $124 trillion of assets</a> will be inherited by younger generations in the next two decades. The largest transfer of wealth in human history. If you’re ready to be at the epicenter of this historic cultural and financial shift, keep reading.</p></div><p><strong>About the team + role</strong></p> <p>We are building an elite team, applying frontier technologies to the world’s biggest financial problems. We’re looking for bold thinkers. Sharp problem-solvers. Builders who are wired to make an impact. Robinhood isn’t a place for complacency, it’s where ambitious people do the best work of their careers. We’re a high-performing, fast-moving team with ethics at the center of everything we do. Expectations are high, and so are the rewards.</p> <p>The<strong> Infrastructure organization builds</strong> and operates the foundational systems that power all of Robinhood’s products and services. This group focuses on reliability, scalability, and developer productivity by delivering platforms, tooling, and compute systems that support engineering teams across the company. Within Infrastructure, you may join one of several specialized teams:</p> <p>Here are a few teams hiring!&nbsp;</p> <ul> <li>The<strong> Backend Platform team</strong> enables fast, safe, and maintainable backend development at scale by building application-layer frameworks, secure dependency management systems, and developer tooling. This team also plays a key role in advancing Go adoption across Robinhood by building shared libraries, improving language tooling, and supporting engineers in developing production-ready Go services.</li> <li>The <strong>Provisioning team</strong> focuses on infrastructure lifecycle management across AWS and Kubernetes environments. This team builds systems and controllers that provision infrastructure, supports application teams with cloud resources, and improves developer workflows for deploying and managing services.</li> <li>The <strong>Kubernetes Compute</strong> team builds and operates a highly available, scalable Kubernetes-based compute platform. This team ensures that container infrastructure supports reliable application deployments, integrates core platform capabilities, and enables multi-region scalability for Robinhood’s systems.</li> <li>The <strong>Technical Assurance Platform team</strong> builds and maintains a centralized service catalog and systems that track service ownership, performance, and reliability across Robinhood’s infrastructure. This team develops tools and systems that surface operational insights and support engineering and leadership decision-making.</li> </ul> <p>As a<strong> Software Developer</strong>, you will contribute to the design, development, and operation of infrastructure platforms and tooling that support developers and systems across Robinhood. You will work on distributed systems, improve developer workflows, and build reliable services that operate at scale. You will collaborate with engineers across infrastructure and product teams to deliver systems that are secure, efficient, and easy to use!</p> <p>This role is based in our Toronto office, with in-person attendance expected at least 3 days per week.</p> <p>At Robinhood, we believe in the power of in-person work to accelerate progress, spark innovation, and strengthen community. Our office experience is intentional, energizing, and designed to fully support high-performing teams.</p> <h2><strong>What you’ll do</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Build and maintain infrastructure platforms, services, and tooling that support application development and system reliability</li> <li>Develop backend systems and services using languages such as Go and Python, contributing to scalable and maintainable codebases</li> <li>Design and improve Kubernetes-based systems, including controllers, deployment workflows, and container infrastructure</li> <li>Partner with engineering teams to provision and optimize cloud infrastructure across AWS environments</li> <li>Debug and resolve system performance issues across distributed systems and infrastructure layers</li> </ul> <h2><strong>What you bring</strong></h2> <ul> <li>You have experience building backend or infrastructure systems using languages such as Go, Python, or similar</li> <li>You have familiarity with Kubernetes and cloud infrastructure platforms such as AWS</li> <li>You have experience working with infrastructure as code tools such as Terraform or similar technologies</li> <li>You are comfortable working with distributed systems and debugging complex system issues</li> <li>You are interested in improving developer experience through tooling, automation, or platform development</li> </ul> <h2><strong>What we offer</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Challenging, high-impact work to grow your career</li> <li>Performance driven compensation with multipliers for outsized impact, bonus programs, and equity ownership</li> <li>Top tier benefits to fuel your work, including supplemental health insurance, ancillary insurance, and mental health support programs</li> <li>Lifestyle wallet - a highly flexible employer-paid benefits spending account expenses beyond traditional benefits such as wellness, childcare, learning, and more.</li> <li>Time off to recharge including company holidays, paid time off, sick time, paid volunteer time off, parental leave, and more!</li> <li>Exceptional office experience with catered meals, events, and comfortable workspaces.&nbsp;</li> <li>Monthly commuter stipend to help offset in-office commuting costs</li> </ul> <p>Our team is committed to providing an inclusive and welcoming interview experience for all candidates. If you require a specific accommodation during the application or interview process due to a physical or mental condition, please complete this<a href="https://robinhood.hracuity.net/webform/index/752875e4-42ba-4dff-9951-fd51e315997e"> Applicant Accommodation Form</a> to notify our team. The form should only be completed if you need a specific accommodation.</p> <p><strong>AI Usage Disclosure:</strong> Robinhood uses artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of our recruiting process. These tools enhance the efficiency and consistency of our hiring process; however, all hiring decisions are made by our hiring teams.</p> <p><strong>Vacancy Notice: </strong>This job posting represents an existing vacancy that we are actively seeking to fill.</p> <p><br><br><br></p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><strong>In addition to the base pay range listed below, this role is also eligible for bonus opportunities + equity + benefits.</strong></p> <p>Base pay for the successful applicant will depend on a variety of job-related factors, which may include education, training, experience, location, business needs, or market demands.
